evidence: "Though short on storyline, I think this is a pretty good casting."
"It's funny, but it's probably best if you're already a fan of Reno 911."
"A movie that started 'so bad it's great' can only be improved by the guys at RiffTrax."
"Great performances, but there is a reason that stage actors wear stage makeup."
"Bad acting. Bad Special Effects. Bad story. Skip."
"I love both of the lead actors in the film (Steve Coogan in Alan Partridge and Judi Dench in As Time Goes By and EVERYTHING ELSE!)"
"A great addition to the Alan Partridge franchise."
"Great casting. Great acting, and a very poignant story."
"The story had sharp dialogue and wonderful character arcs and character development all the way around."
"I really enjoyed this movie. Great casting. Great acting, and a very poignant story."
"I LOVE that Philomena FORGAVE the evil nun in the end."

summary: The user enjoys comedies and dramas, particularly those with strong performances and emotional depth. They prefer fast-paced narratives and show a moderate sensitivity to production quality, while expressing a fondness for specific actors without strong brand loyalty.
